key_factors: PE compressed to 26.3x, near the low end of 1y range (25.4-40.6), with EV/EBIT at 19.9x vs 19.2-32.3 range — valuation reset after 24% 3m drawdown
Fundamentals intact: revenue trajectory 76.4B→77.7B→81.3B, net margin 35.7%, ROE 28.9%, operating margin 46.3%
Fortress balance sheet: $89.46B cash vs $40.26B debt, D/E 0.119 — limits downside risk
News sentiment positive (+0.46 on 3/31) but 'Is Microsoft Stock a Value Trap?' headline flags AI-monetization skepticism as residual risk
